object.name: InputRichMessage
object.description: Describes a rich message to be sent. Exactly one of the fields html, markdown, or blocks must be used.
object.html_description: Describes a rich message to be sent. Exactly one of the fields html, markdown, or blocks must be used.
object.rst_description: Describes a rich message to be sent. Exactly **one** of the fields *html*, *markdown*, or *blocks* must be used.

annotations.description: Content of the rich message to send described using HTML formatting. See rich message formatting options for more details. Use media field to specify the media used in the message.
annotations.html_description: Optional. Content of the rich message to send described using HTML formatting. See rich message formatting options for more details. Use media field to specify the media used in the message.
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Content of the rich message to send described using HTML formatting. See `rich message formatting options <https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options>`_ for more details. Use *media* field to specify the media used in the message.
annotations.name: html

annotations.description: Content of the rich message to send described using Markdown formatting. See rich message formatting options for more details. Use media field to specify the media used in the message.
annotations.html_description: Optional. Content of the rich message to send described using Markdown formatting. See rich message formatting options for more details. Use media field to specify the media used in the message.
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Content of the rich message to send described using Markdown formatting. See `rich message formatting options <https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#rich-message-formatting-options>`_ for more details. Use *media* field to specify the media used in the message.
annotations.name: markdown

annotations.description: Pass True if the rich message must be shown right-to-left
annotations.html_description: Optional. Pass True if the rich message must be shown right-to-left
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Pass :code:`True` if the rich message must be shown right-to-left
annotations.name: is_rtl

annotations.description: Pass True to skip automatic detection of entities (e.g., URLs, email addresses, username mentions, hashtags, cashtags, bot commands, or phone numbers) in the text
annotations.html_description: Optional. Pass True to skip automatic detection of entities (e.g., URLs, email addresses, username mentions, hashtags, cashtags, bot commands, or phone numbers) in the text
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Pass :code:`True` to skip automatic detection of entities (e.g., URLs, email addresses, username mentions, hashtags, cashtags, bot commands, or phone numbers) in the text
annotations.name: skip_entity_detection

annotations.description: Content of the rich message to send described as a list of blocks
annotations.html_description: Optional. Content of the rich message to send described as a list of blocks
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. Content of the rich message to send described as a list of blocks
annotations.name: blocks

annotations.description: List of media that are specified in the markdown or html fields using tg://photo?id=, tg://video?id=, and tg://audio?id= links
annotations.html_description: Optional. List of media that are specified in the markdown or html fields using tg://photo?id=, tg://video?id=, and tg://audio?id= links
annotations.rst_description: *Optional*. List of media that are specified in the *markdown* or *html* fields using :code:`tg://photo?id=`, :code:`tg://video?id=`, and :code:`tg://audio?id=` links
annotations.name: media
